title: IT Support Specialist
description: We're hiring a IT Support Specialist at Okta. This is an exciting opportunity to join our security-conscious, developer-friendly, scaling team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 2-3 years years of experience and are passionate about Identity, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Provide technical support to end users via phone, email, and ticketing systems
Troubleshoot hardware and software issues, escalating complex problems appropriately
Install and configure computers, peripherals, and software applications
Maintain IT asset inventory and manage hardware lifecycle
Document common issues and solutions in knowledge base for user self-service
Contribute to IT security by enforcing password policies and security awareness

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Environmental Health, Public Health, or related field

benefits: Flexible work schedule and remote work options
Wellness programs and gym membership reimbursement
